business_problem: ABS-CBN, one of the Philippines' leading media and entertainment companies serving 120M+ audience, had a massive LTO tape archive that was hard to access in a timely manner, suffered from LTO generation migration overhead, and tied content to on-premises data centers vulnerable to power outages and fires. The company also needed a pandemic-proof Non-Linear Editing (NLE) workflow.
solution_summary: ABS-CBN transformed its media archive infrastructure from legacy LTO tape systems to a cloud-native solution, enabling secure, scalable content storage and pandemic-proof collaboration. The platform ingests archived video and broadcast content into Object Storage Service (OSS), with cold archive tiers for long-term retention, while OSS Standard combined with ISV partner Lucidlink provides real-time collaborative editing capabilities for remote production teams. This unified storage layer eliminates on-premises hardware complexity, reduces CAPEX costs, and enables content creators to work from anywhere worldwide through cloud-connected workstations.
business_outcome: ABS-CBN replaced LTO archive with scalable cloud storage that ensures data integrity without management overhead, minimized on-premises hardware footprint and CAPEX, and enabled global collaborative content production with partners through remote NLE.
metrics: 120M+ audience served across the Philippines and abroad
architecture_clues: OSS across multiple regions for high-resilience media archive
OSS Cold Archive as long-term LTO replacement
OSS Standard + Lucidlink for global collaborative NLE workflow
evidence_quotes: Alibaba Cloud's solution offerings and approach for the storage requirement are strategic, highly scalable and more cost effective, which stand out against the competitors.
Part of the roadmap, OSS Cold Archive is positioned as the cost-effective replacement for the LTO archive that ensures data integrity forever without the management overhead.

OSS Standard, together as a joint solution with storage software ISV, Lucidlink, helps ABS-CBN embark on a new way of doing NLE by maximizing the ROI of existing workstations and providing a pandemic-proof design.

solution_components.name: Object Storage Service
solution_components.role: Scalable object storage for media asset archival and real-time content access, replacing LTO infrastructure

solution_components.name: OSS Cold Archive
solution_components.role: Cost-effective long-term archive storage with guaranteed data integrity, replacing legacy LTO tape management

solution_components.name: Lucidlink
solution_components.role: ISV-provided storage software enabling collaborative non-linear editing workflows with remote access from anywhere in the world

data_flow: Archived broadcast and video content → OSS tiers (Standard and Cold Archive) → collaborative editing via Lucidlink → digital channel distribution
